TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Joseph_Kabila, title = Joseph_Kabila, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joseph_Kabila} }

S.FORM: I 1971 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 4 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joseph Kabila , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Congo, domocratic republic of the anini i ci Joseph Kabila, patirengan a romi'ad i 2001 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~us…ôpńß kab~b~vi…ĺa , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~uŇčo~u, …¨~…ģo~umo~u ¶rati ¶ r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…ĺi ¶ o~uf tńß…ô anini i ¶i *o~us…ôpńß kab~b~vi…ĺa, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1971 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 4 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joseph Kabila , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Congo, domocratic republic of the anini i ci Joseph Kabila, patirengan a romi'ad i 2001 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 26 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~us…ôpńß kab~b~vi…ĺa , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶o~uŇčo~u, …¨~…ģo~umo~u ¶rati ¶ r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…ĺi ¶ o~uf tńß…ô anini i ¶i *o~us…ôpńß kab~b~vi…ĺa, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
